items.caption: A european standard steam boiler safety valve (PN16, DN25)

A technical installation guide for a safety valve connection. it features two photographs of the safety valve assembly, labeled as fig. 3 and fig. 4. the assembly includes a regulator, a safety valve, and a rubber hose. the text provides instructions on how to install the safety valve, emphasizing the importance of safety and proper installation. the text also specifies the model of the safety valve as "cng regulator 1r safety valve connection 1r rubber hose (4x11) part# 0294620 2 t joint part# 492211." the guide is designed to ensure the correct installation of safety equipment for a vehicle.
